rationale: No direct conflict. Educ. Code §21.905 governs educator preparation partnerships and compensation funded under §48.157. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13, so increasing the homestead exemption does not conflict with this statute's operative provisions.
quote: A school district or open-enrollment charter school participating in the alternative partnership preservice program shall use money received under Section 48.157(b)(3) to provide compensation to:
_note: Indirect fiscal linkage may exist via school district property value effects on FSP funding, but no direct statutory conflict is present.
